name: File Actions Manager
description: Custom SAC widget for uploading, listing, downloading, and deleting files with MongoDB backend.

setUniqueFileKey.description: Sets the SAC-generated file context key.

getUniqueFileKey.description: Gets the current SAC-generated file context key.

setApiBaseUrl.description: Sets the backend API base URL.

getApiBaseUrl.description: Gets the backend API base URL.

refreshFiles.description: Refreshes the file list from the backend.

onUploadSuccess.description: Called when a file upload succeeds.

onUploadError.description: Called when a file upload fails.

onDeleteSuccess.description: Called when a file delete succeeds.

onDeleteError.description: Called when a file delete fails.

onFilesLoaded.description: Called when the file list is loaded.
